hero.headline: Building-related services with clarity before execution.
hero.subheadline: We help clients plan, design, renovate, visualize, and build better spaces through field understanding, budget-aware guidance, and clear communication.

construction.title: Building Construction
construction.description: Planning and execution support for residential and building-related construction projects.

renovation.title: Renovation & Remodeling
renovation.description: Improving existing homes, rooms, offices, and spaces with better planning and finishing.

interior.title: Interior Design
interior.description: Practical and premium interior direction based on lifestyle, function, taste, and budget.

visualization.title: 3D Design & Visualization
visualization.description: Visual design support to help clients understand their space before execution begins.

fieldVisit.title: Field Visit & Site Study
fieldVisit.description: Understanding the real site condition, location, access, and client needs before planning.

budgetPlanning.title: Budget-Based Planning
budgetPlanning.description: Helping clients choose better design, material, and execution options under their budget range.
